context: User wants a /deploy command that accepts an environment argument and uses dynamic git context.

checklist.name: Uses $ARGUMENTS or $1 for environment
checklist.description: Template uses `$ARGUMENTS` or `$1` to insert the environment name

checklist.name: Uses ! for shell command injection
checklist.description: Uses `!\`git log --oneline -5\`` or similar for dynamic git context

checklist.name: Description frontmatter present
checklist.description: Has a YAML frontmatter block with a `description` field

checklist.name: Agent does NOT call /deploy recursively
checklist.description: Instructions do not tell the agent to invoke `/deploy` or other slash commands
